attack.name: Overrun
attack.text: All Hunters on The Great Bridge tile must Dodge ({slow}) or suffer 2 {dmg} and Stun.

attack.name: Arcing Sweep
attack.text: Cannot be Staggered. Targets all Hunters in this space. Hunters hit are moved 1 space away and suffer Stun.

options.label: SLAY BOTH THE CHURCH SERVANT AND ADELLA
SLAY THE SERVANT AND LURE ADELLA INTO OEDON CHAPEL

attack.name: Flamesprayer
attack.text: Stagger. Targets all Hunters within 1 space.

options.label: AID THE EXECUTIONERS IN PURGING THE CATHEDRAL WARD

_comment: Hand-authored mission DSL for Secrets of the Church, encoded from games/bloodborne/golden/transcribed/missions-secrets-of-the-church.json (verbatim text). IMPORTANT: the chapter cards' back sides (Chapter N - Missions lists) were NOT transcribed for this campaign, so all chapter trigger tables below are INFERRED from campaign structure and card texts - see _unsupported. Spawn-space icons: uncertain colored icons resolved via anySpawn where the tile has a single spawn icon (every core tile except Central Lamp); errata applied on card 18 only (Cleric Beast on enemy-3 space of The Great Bridge). Tomb of Oedon and Grand Cathedral lamp spaces are unnamed in tiles-core, and findSpace has no lamp: selector, so lamp-space spawns there use tile:<Name> (named space) as the nearest expressible space - flagged in _unsupported.

_unsupported.need: chapter-back MISSIONS list not transcribed; triggers inferred: startOfHunt reveal 1 (hunt line), Great Bridge reveal 6 (card 6 is set there), Courtyard Lamp reveal 10 (Adella token placed there), Alleyway reveal 13 (only chapter tile otherwise unused as a trigger). Verify against the physical card back.
_unsupported.printedText: (back of chapter card not present in missions-secrets-of-the-church.json)

_unsupported.need: chapter-back MISSIONS list not transcribed; triggers inferred: startOfHunt reveal 16 and 24, Occupied House reveal 26, Graveyard reveal 30. Triggers for 18/22 lifted from card 17's dual goal (see card 17 entry). Verify against the physical card back.
_unsupported.printedText: (back of chapter card not present in missions-secrets-of-the-church.json)

_unsupported.need: chapter-back MISSIONS list not transcribed; triggers inferred: startOfHunt reveal 35, Oedon Chapel reveal 40, Ransacked House reveal 54 (guess - only unused chapter tile), huntTrackReset reveal 56 ('moon reaches its apex' reads as a timed hunt-track trigger; reset index guessed as 2). ALSO: 'huntTrackReset' is not a supported trigger 'on' value - the interpreter only fires startOfHunt and endMoveOnTile triggers, so card 56 will never auto-reveal.
_unsupported.printedText: (back of chapter card not present in missions-secrets-of-the-church.json)

_unsupported.need: prePlace layout branches (Oedon Chapel touches Central Lamp; The Great Bridge AND Tomb of Oedon both touch Oedon Chapel) - not expressible as the worked example's linear 'chain'; encoded as an 'attach' list on Chapter 2 - Setup which the setup consumer must support.
_unsupported.printedText: Before generating the tile deck, take the Oedon Chapel tile and connect it to the Central Lamp. Then, take The Great Bridge and Tomb of Oedon tiles and connect them to Oedon Chapel.

_unsupported.need: conditional extra spawn (spawnEnemy count is a plain number; no 1-or-2-at-3+-hunters spec) and lamp-space spawn (Tomb of Oedon lamp space is unnamed; no lamp: selector in findSpace - used tile:Tomb of Oedon).
_unsupported.printedText: Spawn 1 Church Servant and 1 Church Giant on its {lamp} space. If 3+ Hunters, spawn 1 additional Church Giant.

_unsupported.need: hpPool applies to every enemy sharing the mission tag, but the printed token protects ONLY the Church Servant (the Giants share tag 3); end-of-round bonus Activation for a regular enemy (bossOverride bonusActivationRoundEnd is boss-only); Church Giant no-Stagger + ability-becomes-Special would need a type-scoped replaceAttack (tag-scoped would also hit the Servant).
_unsupported.printedText: When the Church Servant would be slain, instead, remove the token and Heal all {dmg} from it. Token is returned on {reset}. At the end of each round, it makes 1 bonus Activation, targeting the Hunter on its tile with the lowest HP. The Church Giants can never become Staggered and, if Ability is flipped, replace it with their Special.

_unsupported.need: single fog gate on one exit only (fogGates effect surrounds the whole tile and breaks lamps).
_unsupported.printedText: Place a Fog Gate token on the opposite side to mark that it is impassable.

_unsupported.need: spawn 1 Church Servant on EVERY enemy/lamp-icon space except Central Lamp, on reveal and after each reset (spawnEnemy takes a single space). Token decrement on slay IS encoded via decrementOnSlay hook.
_unsupported.printedText: When this card is revealed, and after each {reset}, spawn 1 Church Servant on each space with a {enemy?} or {lamp} icon other than the Central Lamp.

_unsupported.need: dual endMoveOnTile goal (Great Bridge reveals 18, Tomb of Oedon reveals 22) - one goal per card, so 18 is the card goal and 22 is a chapter trigger, which is NOT gated behind card 17 being revealed (and in ch2 both tiles are pre-placed adjacent Oedon Chapel, so early reveal is reachable); single fog gate on one Graveyard exit; 'remains in play until 18 and 22 revealed' not tracked.
_unsupported.printedText: This card remains in play until cards 18 and 22 have both been revealed. Block 1 exit on the Graveyard with a Fog Gate to mark the entrance to the Central Plaza. It cannot be crossed.

_unsupported.need: spawnBoss always spawns at Phase 1; card spawns the Cleric Beast at Phase 2. (Spawn space uses enemy3:The Great Bridge per errata.)
_unsupported.printedText: Spawn the Cleric Beast (Phase 2) on its {enemy?} space.

_unsupported.need: insight requirement scales with party size (4 at 3+ Hunters); insightThisChapter count is a fixed number - encoded 3.
_unsupported.printedText: Complete the Hunt at the end of a round if you have collected at least 3 Insight. If 3+ Hunters, collect at least 4 Insight: Reveal card 21.

_unsupported.need: spawnBoss always spawns at Phase 1 (card spawns Father Gascoigne at Phase 2); lamp-space spawn (Tomb of Oedon lamp space unnamed - used tile:Tomb of Oedon).
_unsupported.printedText: Spawn Father Gascoigne (Phase 2) on its {lamp} space.

_unsupported.need: survivor token + Church Giant on every Named Location space (incl. newly revealed, unless fog-gated), Interact-to-claim tokens onto the card, and their respawn on reset - no hook covers interact-to-claim, so counterAtLeast never auto-advances; surfaced as special rule for manual handling.
_unsupported.printedText: Place 1 Survivor token and 1 Church Giant on each Named Location space (unless Fog Gated), and each time one is revealed. Hunters may Interact on these spaces to claim these tokens and place them on this card. Both the tokens and Giants respawn on these spaces on {reset}.

_unsupported.need: remove 1 token from the card each time Alfred is moved onto a tile that has no token yet (1 per tile) - no hook; counterExhausted never auto-fires.
_unsupported.printedText: When Alfred is moved onto a tile, take 1 Insight token from this card and place it on that tile. Each tile may have 1 token.

_unsupported.need: enemies persist and heal (not removed, no respawn) on reset - encoded as data params only; fog-gate removal on the 3rd reset space of the Hunt Track (the slain-enemies removal path IS encoded as a slayTagged goal on card 37).
_unsupported.printedText: These Enemies are not removed on {reset}, but Heal all {dmg}. They do not respawn. Remove the Fog Gates when these Enemies have been slain, or when the 3rd {reset} space of the Hunt Track is reached.

_unsupported.need: mid-hunt tile placement (connect the Grand Cathedral to the Courtyard Lamp tile) - no effect exists; WITHOUT it card 36's endMoveOnTile Grand Cathedral goal can never fire. Also insight-conditional Frenzy and -1 {dmg}/-1 {medium} penalties on the Grand Cathedral tile.
_unsupported.printedText: Connect the Grand Cathedral to the Courtyard Lamp tile. Hunters entering the Grand Cathedral tile suffer Frenzy unless you have collected at least 1 Insight this Chapter. Hunter's Attacks and Dodges suffer -1 {dmg} and -1 {medium} while on the Grand Cathedral tile unless you have collected at least 2 Insight this Chapter.

_unsupported.need: lamp-space spawn (Grand Cathedral lamp space is unnamed - used tile:Grand Cathedral).
_unsupported.printedText: Spawn Vicar Amelia on its {lamp} space.

_unsupported.need: Adella is an insight-token enemy with a bespoke stat card (1 HP, aura: enemies within 1 space Block 2 when flipping Ability/Special, Basic-only Poisoned Blade {medium}{medium} {dmg} Poison) - no enemy definition exists; spawnNpc on card 42/49 will surface until an 'Adella' enemy def is added. Card 42's slayTagged goal will complete on the Church Servant alone while the Adella spawn is unresolved.
_unsupported.printedText: Adella has 1 HP. Any time an Enemy within 1 space of Adella (including herself) flips Ability or Special, they also Block 2 {dmg}. Adella only Attacks when Basic is flipped: BASIC: POISONED BLADE {medium}{medium} {dmg} Poison

_unsupported.need: Celestial Child is an insight-token enemy with a bespoke stat card (1 HP, aura Block 2, Basic-only Horrific Cries {fast}{fast}{fast} {dmg} Frenzy, cannot be Dodged, targets all Hunters within 2 spaces) - no enemy definition exists; spawnNpc on card 46 will surface. Card 46's slayTagged goal will complete on the Church Servant alone while the spawn is unresolved.
_unsupported.printedText: The Celestial Child has 1 HP. Any time an Enemy within 1 space of the Celestial Child (including itself) flips Ability or Special, they also Block 2 {dmg}. The Child only Attacks when Basic is flipped: BASIC: HORRIFIC CRIES {fast}{fast}{fast} {dmg} Frenzy Cannot be Dodged. Targets all Hunters within 2 spaces.

_unsupported.need: relative spawn ('2 spaces away from yours') - findSpace has no relative selector and spawn effects do not resolve 'self'; spawn left as custom. Outcome-based dual completion (slay both vs. slay Servant and lure Adella into Oedon Chapel) has no goal type - encoded as a player choice, which prompts at reveal rather than at resolution.
_unsupported.printedText: Place 1 Insight token (Adella) and 1 Church Servant 2 spaces away from yours. They do not respawn once slain. Slay both the Church Servant and Adella: Reveal card 44. Slay the Church Servant and lure Adella into Oedon Chapel: Reveal card 50.

_unsupported.need: discard Blood Echoes in the Dream (instead of Upgrading) to place tokens on this card - no hook; counterAtLeast never auto-advances.
_unsupported.printedText: When Hunters go to the Dream, instead of using Blood Echoes for Upgrading, they may instead discard them to place Insight tokens on this card.

_unsupported.need: Executioners are {n} insight-token enemies with a bespoke stat card (2 HP, no respawn, Ability/Special becomes Basic +1 {medium} +1 {dmg} Stagger, Basic: Hunter's Zeal {medium}{medium} {dmg}{dmg} cannot be Staggered) spawned at the Central Lamp by card 57 - no enemy definition exists; card 57's slayTagged goal tracks Alfred only. Persist-and-heal on reset also not enforced.
_unsupported.printedText: Executioners are represented by Insight tokens (Executioner). They are Enemies with 2 HP and do not respawn once slain. If they flip Ability or Special, they use Basic with +1 {medium}, +1 {dmg}, and Stagger.

_unsupported.need: survivor token on every enemy/lamp-icon space (incl. newly revealed); Hunters Attack the tokens to move them onto this card - no hook; counterAtLeast never auto-advances.
_unsupported.printedText: Place 1 Survivor token on each space with a {enemy?} or {lamp} icon, and on new ones when revealed. Hunters may Attack these tokens. When they are Attacked, remove them and place them on this card.
